text.title: practices-frontend-components Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for practices-frontend-components as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: CSF2 `Template.bind({})` pattern: `const Template = (args) => <Button {...args}/>; export const Primary = Template.bind({})`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Deprecated in Storybook v7; no TypeScript inference for controls. Agents copy this pattern from older documentation.

failure-mode.description: Inline hex strings in component styles: `color: '#3b82f6'` or `background: '#ef4444'`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Color drift: agents produce slightly different hex strings each time. No central change point.

failure-mode.description: CLAUDE.md that exceeds 200 lines by summarizing every function and every file in prose.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consumes the agent's working context window on non-essential content; slows routing and increases cost. CLAUDE.md is a routing document, not a full API reference.
